content:
✨ FadCam | Java
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a versatile and privacy-conscious multimedia recording tool for Android devices, enabling various recording scenarios from background surveillance to screen capture and live broadcasts.
✨ Key Features: • Background video recording • Screen recording • Live streaming • Remote camera control • Ad-free and open-source
📖 Summary: FadCam is an open-source, ad-free Android application designed for multimedia recording. It offers advanced features such as background video recording, screen recording, live streaming capabilities, and remote camera control, all while prioritizing user privacy.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
